strategyResults.details: 0 errors on new/modified files; 2 pre-existing warnings in eval-persist.test.ts.
fact-detector 17 + fact-retrieve 13 = 30 new; full suite 184 files / 2210 pass / 3 skipped; zero regressions.

criteriaResults.evidence: detectProjectFacts (lines 58-108) PURE — no readFile/new Date/createClient; all IO in seedProjectFacts (144-201); createClient only in a comment.
fixture detection (test/build/packageManager=npm/framework=react); double-reconcile NOOP-on-unchanged, supersede-on-changed, one active row per predicate.

pipeline.ts +12 at L1030 (between loadTeam and engine.run) try/catch warn-and-continue; chat-session.ts +9 at L504 (after banner, before for-await) try/catch swallow. Additive, no phase reorder; facts failure cannot abort run.

retrieveRelevantFacts → getActiveFacts(scope) SQL 'WHERE scope=? AND t_invalidated IS NULL' (scope isolation + active-only at DB layer); serializeFactsForContext slice(0,charBudget) (<=budget, 0→''); scope A never surfaces for scope B (tested both store + retrieval level).
lint 0 errors on all new/modified files.

summary: Final sprint passes all 6 criteria. Pure detectProjectFacts vs thin seedProjectFacts IO boundary correct; pipeline.ts + chat-session.ts wiring additive and guarded; scope isolation enforced at SQL layer; charBudget hard cap; no LLM on produce path. 30 new tests, full 2213-test suite green, zero regressions across the load-bearing pipeline/chat/planner files.
